The Power of Triphala

Gentle Detoxification

Safely flushes out accumulated toxins from the body without causing discomfort or dependency.

Improves Digestion

Strengthens the digestive fire (Agni), promoting better absorption of nutrients and alleviating bloating.

Natural Colon Cleanser

Supports healthy bowel movements and maintains overall colon health through traditional botanicals.

About This Product

Triphala, literal meaning "three fruits," is one of the most respected herbal blends in the Ayurvedic pharmacopoeia. Jammi's Triphala Churna is meticulously prepared using the finest quality of Amalaki, Bibhitaki, and Haritaki, balanced according to ancient Shastric texts.

This powerful combination acts as a Rasayana, or rejuvenator, that supports all three doshas (Vata, Pitta, and Kapha). It is particularly effective for those seeking a sustainable way to maintain digestive regularity and systemic detoxification.

  • Ethically sourced forest-grown herbs
  • Micronized powder for maximum absorption
  • Free from additives, preservatives, or artificial colors

Key Ingredients

A

Amalaki (Indian Gooseberry)

Rich in Vitamin C, supports liver function

B

Bibhitaki (Baheda)

Supports respiratory and colon health

H

Haritaki (Harad)

The "King of Medicines" for digestion

How To Consume

01

Measure Dosage

Take 3-6g (1-2 teaspoons) of the powder.

02

Prepare Mix

Mix with a glass of lukewarm water or honey.

03

Best Timing

Consume at bedtime for optimal digestive rest.

04

Consistency

Use daily for at least 3 months for best results.

Frequently Asked Questions

Yes, Triphala is traditionally used daily as a gentle cleanser and tonic. Unlike stimulant laxatives, it is non-habit forming when taken in recommended dosages.
While some notice digestive relief within a few days, the rejuvenating systemic benefits typically manifest after 4-6 weeks of consistent use.
We recommend consulting with your healthcare provider before starting any herbal supplement during pregnancy or while breastfeeding.
